reviews.comment:
El despacho de combustibles y revisión de agua, aceite y demás  muy bueno. La comida envasada  y cara. Pese al fin de semana largo no estaba abierta la parrilla. El baño limpio.

(Translated by Google)
The fuel station and the checks on water, oil, and other supplies were very good. The packaged food was expensive. Despite the long weekend, the grill was closed. The bathroom was clean.
